description: Provides enhanced terminal accessibility for Windows Terminal and PowerShell, enabling screen reader users to efficiently navigate and interact with command-line interfaces. Inspired by TDSR (Terminal Data Structure Reader) and incorporates functionality from both TDSR and Speakup. Advanced features inspired by community suggestions and discussions.
changelog: New error/warning audio cues, profile selection dialog, enhanced bookmarks with labels, settings panel reorganization, gesture changes to avoid NVDA conflicts, and deprecation notices for v2.
